history.content:
<thought>
The agent is at (07, D), facing north (up). The cell directly ahead (06, D) is lava (L), so moving forward is deadly. To the left is a wall (#) at column C, and to the right is a floor (.) at column E. Turning right will orient the agent east, allowing a safe move forward into cell (07, E) on the next step. Therefore, the best action is to turn right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The agent is at row 07, column D, facing up. The cell directly ahead (row 06, column D) is a safe floor cell. No goal is visible yet, so moving forward is the best option to explore northward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The agent is at row 07, column D, facing north. The cell directly ahead (06D) is a safe floor tile. Moving forward will allow further exploration and potentially reveal more of the map. There are no visible threats directly ahead.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The agent is at D07 facing north. The cell directly ahead (D06) is floor ('.'), so moving forward is safe. Lava is to the left (C07) and a wall is to the right (E07). I will proceed forward to explore further and find the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The cell directly ahead (north) is floor ('.'), which is safe to step on. The cells to the left and right are lava and wall, respectively, so they are not viable options. Moving forward will allow me to explore further north and potentially find the goal. I will move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The agent is at row 07, column D, facing north. The cell directly ahead (north) is lava (L), so moving forward is deadly. To the right (east) is a wall (#), so no passage. To the left (west) are floor cells (C7, B7, A7) that are safe. Therefore, the best course is to turn left to face west and then move forward onto safe floor tiles to explore further. Since the goal is not yet visible, we must prioritize safe exploration.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
The agent is at row 07, column D, facing up. The cell directly ahead at row 06, column D is a safe floor cell (`.`). Moving forward brings me closer to the goal while staying on a safe path. The goal is at row 01, column F, and moving upward along column D allows me to later turn right at row 02 to cross column E safely. No immediate danger.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at D07 facing north. The cell directly ahead (D06) is a floor cell, safe to move into. To reach the goal at F02, I need to go north along column D until row 03, then head east to column F, and finally north to the goal. Moving forward now is safe and makes progress.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The goal is at (03, F). I am at (07, D) facing north. The cell directly ahead (06, D) is a safe floor. I need to move north to reach row 04 where I can cross east to column F and then go north to the goal. The next step is to move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The cell directly ahead (row 06 col D) is lava, and the cells to the left (row 07 col C) and right (row 07 col E) are also lava. Moving forward would be fatal, and turning to face either side still puts lava directly ahead. I need to find a safe path, likely by going south where the map may be unexplored but could lead to a safe route to the goal. I will start by turning clockwise.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>The goal is visible at row 05 column A. I am at row 07 column D facing north, but the cell directly in front (row 06 column D) is lava. I need to go west to column B where there is a safe path north (row 06 column B is empty). So I will turn left to face west.</thought>
<action>TURN_LEFT</action>

<thought>
The agent is at D07, facing up. The cell directly in front (D06) is a floor ('.'), which

<thought>
The goal is at row 04, column F. The cell directly in front of me (row 06, column D) is a safe floor cell, so I can move forward. I will then continue to navigate towards the goal, first moving up to row 05, then turning right to go east along row 05 to column F, and finally turning left to reach the goal. For now, moving forward is safe and progresses towards the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The goal is visible at row 05, column F. I am currently at row 07, column D, facing north. The cell directly ahead (north) is row 06, column D, which is a floor cell (safe). Moving forward takes me one step closer to the goal without entering lava. I can then turn right and move east to reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The goal is at F06. The cell directly ahead (D06) is safe but leads to a dead end with walls and lava. To reach the goal, I can move east through E07 and F07, then north to F06. I am currently facing north, so I need to turn right to face east. This is the first step toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The goal is at row 05, column C, visible from my current position. The cell in front of me (06D) is a floor tile, which is safe to step on. From there, I can move forward again to 05D, then turn left and move forward to the goal at 05C. The lava cells (06C and 06E) are adjacent but not on my direct path. I will move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The goal is at row 06 column C, which is to my north-west. I am facing north. The cell in front of me (06, D) is empty and safe. Moving forward will position me directly south of the goal. From there, I can turn left and move into the goal. Therefore, MOVE_FORWARD is the correct next action.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The goal (G) is immediately to my left at row 07, column C. I am currently facing north (as indicated by being at the bottom-center with forward pointing up). To reach the goal, I need to turn left to face west and then move forward. Since I can only take one action per step, I will turn left now.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
The goal position `G` is directly in front of me (row 06, column D). The cell is not a wall or lava, so moving forward will reach the goal safely.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
